backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing relationship management system with partners and pets, user profiles, access control, and invite links integration using Motoko Map/List collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features for invitation link generation, dashboard integration, signup flow, and React Query hooks with associated test IDs and high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components including App, Dashboard, forms, cards, and invitation-related components with their key responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors with neutral grayscale palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Relationship Harmony application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication flow, invitation code detection from URL params, auto-creation of default relationships, and routing between invitation acceptance and dashboard views with theme provider.
frontend/src/components/AddPetModal.tsx: Dialog modal component wrapping PetForm for adding new pets to a relationship with compassionate messaging.
frontend/src/components/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying partners section with InviteLinkGenerator, partner cards grid, and PetCareSection with loading states and empty state messaging.
frontend/src/components/InvitationAccept: Multi-step invitation acceptance flow handling authentication, profile creation, and automatic relationship joining with loading states and success feedback using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/InviteLinkGenera: React component that generates and displays unique invitation links for partners to join a relationship network, with copy-to-clipboard functionality and usage instructions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header with authentication controls (login/logout), footer with branding, and a gradient background wrapper for the application.
frontend/src/components/PartnerCard.tsx: Displays a partner's information in a card format with relationship type icons (romantic/friend/family), name, and connection date.
frontend/src/components/PetCard.tsx: Displays pet information in a card including name, type (dog/cat/bird/other), care schedule, and emotional support notes with appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/PetCareSection.t: Section component that displays a grid of pet cards with an 'Add Pet' button and empty state when no pets exist.
frontend/src/components/PetForm.tsx: Form component for adding pets with fields for name, type selection (dog/cat/bird/other), care schedule, and emotional support notes, submitting via useAddPet mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for user profiles, relationships, partners, pets, and invitation operations with automatic cache invalidation and actor integration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with warm, nurturing color palette (rose/pink primary, lavender secondary) for light and dark modes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme with OKLCH color system, custom animations, typography, and container queries plugins for the relationship management UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking polyamorous relationship app features including partner invitation system, pet care, and implementation priorities with architectural notes.
